triage_reason: Novel TT-based CSL model checking approach but insufficient depth: unresolved clamping gap, no independent certificate verification, fragile fixpoint convergence

improvements.title: Resolve the Clamping Soundness Gap
improvements.weakness_addressed: SVD truncation produces negative probabilities; post-truncation clamping breaks contractivity; no tight bound on clamping error
approach: Strengthen Proposition 1 with rigorous proof: ‖p_clamped − p_SVD‖₁ ≤ ε_trunc (not 2ε), since negative entries are a subset of the error
Implement proper non-negativity-preserving TT rounding via alternating projections (Uschmajew 2015) with convergence monitoring
Add NNTT rounding as default mode: SVD compress → clamp → re-compress cycle with certified error tracking at each iteration
Propagate clamping error through the full certification pipeline: ErrorCertificate now carries per-step clamping bounds
Add numerical experiments verifying the clamping bound on birth-death, toggle switch, and Schlögl models

improvements.title: Build Independent Certificate Verification
improvements.weakness_addressed: Error certificates computed by same system that generates results; no separate checker for post-hoc auditing
approach: Create tn_check/verifier/ module: standalone certificate checker
VerificationTrace dataclass: stores per-step TT states, truncation errors, FSP bounds, clamping events, bond dimensions
CertificateVerifier class: re-derives error bounds from the trace without re-running time evolution

Checks: (1) per-step truncation errors are consistent with bond dimensions, (2) clamping errors satisfy Proposition 1, (3) total error composition is sound (triangle inequality), (4) probability conservation holds within tolerance, (5) FSP bounds are consistent
VerificationReport: structured output with pass/fail per check, overall soundness verdict
JSON serialization of traces for external auditing

improvements.title: Spectral-Gap-Informed Fixpoint Convergence
improvements.weakness_addressed: Fixpoint iteration fragile for slowly-mixing CTMCs with metastability; no formal convergence criterion
approach: Estimate spectral gap of projected rate matrix via power iteration on the MPS representation
Use gap estimate to predict required iteration count: K ≈ log(1/ε) / gap
If predicted K exceeds max_iter, auto-fallback to bounded-until before wasting iterations
Add convergence rate monitoring: track geometric convergence ratio between consecutive iterations
Report spectral gap estimate and predicted convergence in ConvergenceDiagnostics
For slowly-mixing CTMCs: implement adaptive time-bound selection for fallback (T = C/gap)

success_criteria: All tests pass including new tests for each improvement
Certificate verifier independently validates error bounds on 3+ models
Clamping error bound is tight and verified numerically
Spectral gap estimation correctly predicts convergence/divergence
